raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint regarding American Express refusal to provide relief for a prepaid annual service that was not delivered due to the merchant permanently ceasing operations. 

On XX/XX/year>, I paid approximately {$1000.00} in a single lump-sum payment using my American Express XXXX XXXX for a XXXX health coaching program operated by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  previously known as XXXX  XXXX  XXXX, founded by XXXX XXXX. I have written documentation confirming this was a XXXX prepaid program. 

The program included XXXX  group calls, XXXX personal lab review consultations, supplement discounts, and full access to an online educational library. The services were explicitly centered around XXXX XXXX personal involvement. 

Approximately XXXX month after my purchase, XXXX XXXX passed away. At the time, there was no formal communication indicating that services would permanently cease, and I reasonably believed the company would continue servicing enrolled members. 

However, I recently discovered that the website is no longer accessible, member login access has been removed, phone numbers are disconnected, emails have gone unanswered, and social media outreach has received no response. All contracted deliverables have effectively been removed and are no longer available. 

I received approximately XXXX month of services out of the XXXX prepaid contract. As a result, the majority of the contracted services approximately XXXX  months were never delivered due to permanent merchant cessation. 

I have attempted to resolve this matter with American Express XXXX XXXX but have been informed that the transaction falls outside of a XXXX dispute window. This is not a dissatisfaction issue ; it is a material failure to provide contracted prepaid services due to business closure. 

I have been an American Express customer for over XXXX years and have maintained my account in good standing. Despite the unique and verifiable circumstances of merchant cessation, no goodwill adjustment or discretionary review has been offered. 

As a XXXX XXXX XXXX, I reasonably expected protection in situations involving prepaid services that were not delivered due to permanent merchant closure. 

I am requesting a fair reconsideration and billing adjustment for the unused portion of the prepaid annual program.
